title: Turkiye inflation and FX pressure
description: Domestic instability risk in Turkiye during 2023 under persistent inflation, FX stress, and import dependence.

scenario.question: Could inflation, FX pressure and domestic unrest destabilize Turkiye in 2023?

historical_signals: The intended stress channels are inflation, FX pressure, and domestic stability, not interstate war.
Regime stress and strategic dependency should both remain visible in the crisis layer.
